# freeswitch_gateway (Resource)

A FreeSWITCH Sofia SIP gateway / trunk.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "freeswitch_gateway" "provider_main" {
  name     = "provider-main"
  profile  = "external"
  proxy    = "sip.provider.example"
  realm    = "sip.provider.example"
  username = "sip-user"
  password = var.sip_password
  register = true

  params = {
    expire-seconds = "3600"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `profile` (String)
- `proxy` (String)

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `params` (Map of String)
- `password` (String, Sensitive)
- `realm` (String)
- `register` (Boolean)
- `username` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# freeswitch_gateway is imported by "profile/name".
terraform import freeswitch_gateway.provider_main external/provider-main
```
